allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres psql -U postgres -h localhost -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend\(pid\) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'accioneselbosque' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid\(\);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend\(pid\) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'accioneselbosque' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid\(\);")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS accioneselbosque;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "CREATE DATABASE accioneselbosque;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -d accioneselbosque -c "\\d usuario")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -c "DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS accioneselbosque; CREATE DATABASE accioneselbosque;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -d accioneselbosque -c "SELECT u.id, u.correo, u.nombre_completo, cf.saldo_disponible FROM usuario u LEFT JOIN cuenta_fondos cf ON cf.inversionista_id = u.id WHERE u.rol IN \('INVERSIONISTA','INVERSIONISTA_PREMIUM'\) ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=postgres "/c/Program Files/PostgreSQL/18/bin/psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -d accioneselbosque -c "INSERT INTO cuenta_fondos \(inversionista_id, saldo_disponible, fondos_reservados, actualizado_en\) VALUES \(4, 1000000.00, 0.00, now\(\)\) ON CONFLICT \(inversionista_id\) DO UPDATE SET saldo_disponible = 1000000.00, fondos_reservados = 0.00, actualizado_en = now\(\); SELECT inversionista_id, saldo_disponible FROM cuenta_fondos WHERE inversionista_id = 4;")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('cash:', d.get\('cash'\), 'buying_power:', d.get\('buying_power'\)\)")
